value.title: Amazon Stock Slips Below Key Level. Why It's A Rough Day For Cloud Hyperscaler Stocks.
value.summary: Amazon stock broke below its 200-day line as it continued a slump that has wiped out its rally from April.

value.title: Netflix Stock Craters To Lowest Level In 20 Months
value.summary: Netflix stock sank to its lowest level in 20 months as the subscription streaming video leader deals with negative sentiment.

value.title: Alphabet’s Waymo Targets Germany In Next Phase of Robotaxi Rollout
value.summary: Alphabet-owned autonomous vehicle pioneer Waymo has legally established a new corporate entity in Germany, laying the groundwork to deploy its driverless robotaxis across Europe.
